category.title: Select Category
category.subtitle: Choose the type of project you need a quote for

form.autoExtracted: Information auto-extracted from image. Please review and edit if needed.

Interior Architecture.description: e.g. Cafe interior remodeling in Gangnam-gu
Interior Architecture.scope: e.g. Full 80㎡ renovation (flooring, walls, ceiling, lighting, furniture)
Interior Architecture.requirements: e.g. Modern minimal style, eco-friendly materials, minimize business disruption

IT.description: e.g. Reservation management web platform for small businesses
IT.scope: e.g. Frontend (React), Backend (Node.js), DB, admin dashboard
IT.requirements: e.g. Mobile responsive, payment integration, push notifications

Consulting.description: e.g. Series A fundraising strategy consulting for startup
Consulting.scope: e.g. Business model analysis, market research, IR deck preparation
Consulting.requirements: e.g. Target fundraising within 3 months, weekly meetings

Translation.description: e.g. SaaS product UI/UX and marketing materials EN→KO translation
Translation.scope: e.g. ~5,000 words of web app UI text, landing page, email templates
Translation.requirements: e.g. Consistent IT terminology, localization-level translation, glossary provided

image.analyzing: 🔍 GPT-4o Vision is analyzing the image...

image.errorType: Only image files can be uploaded.
image.errorSize: File size must be 5MB or less.

about.title: 🏢 About Us
about.subtitle: KZ Network Co., Ltd. empowers business decisions with AI technology.
about.serviceTitle: 🤖 What is the AI Quote Generator?
about.serviceDesc1: KZ Network's AI Quote Generator uses OpenAI GPT-4o to automatically generate project quotes for interior design, IT development, management consulting, and translation.
about.serviceDesc2: Traditionally, getting a quote required contacting multiple vendors and waiting days. Our service delivers detailed quotes with quality feedback based on Korean market rates within seconds — just enter your project details or upload a planning document.
about.aiLawDesc: This service complies with the AI Basic Act (Act No. 20692) by disclosing that all content is AI-generated. All quote results are automatically generated for reference only and do not constitute legally binding contracts. For inquiries or objections regarding AI-generated results, contact kz4network@gmail.com.

guide.title: 📚 Project Pricing Guide
guide.subtitle: Learn about pricing standards and cost-saving tips for interior, IT, consulting, and translation projects.
guide.aiCtaDesc: Use this guide as a reference and enter your project details — GPT-4o will instantly generate a tailored quote based on Korean market rates. Image upload also supported.
guide.noGuideTitle: 🤔 Still unsure after reading the guide?
guide.noGuideDesc: Enter your project details or upload a planning document and GPT-4o will instantly provide a detailed, itemized quote with quality feedback based on Korean market rates. Free to use.
